narrative:
West Chester Twp 2 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,142 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.2 percentage points.
